data.name: SBcatfight game
data.detailed_description:
This game is an RPG maker game.

The game is a basic RPG maker game with turn-based combat.
There is a pattern for each fighter; you have to play to your opponent's behavior, not just fight.

The game has a main story and a sub-story. As you progress through the sub-stories, you'll learn about the fighters' stories.

If you find the game too difficult, look around - there are sure to be NPCs giving you hints!
You can also earn in-game money to improve your skills or increase your HP MAX, which will give you an advantage in battle!

When you win or lose a battle, you get a contextual CG, which is basically in every battle, and subquests also have CGs.

DoNyan first game SBcatfight
I did my best, but you might see some flaws.
I hope you enjoyed playing it!

data.short_description: This game is about a fighter "Tella" who wants to become stronger and what happens in SB catfight, a female catfight organization.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or higher
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL compliant video card
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.10 or better. Not supported: macOS Big Sur 11.0 and later.
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 14.04 or Steam OS 2.0 (64 bit)
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
